calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Set For Trial On Jun-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING
Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Atty. Jacqueline Ravenscroft of Tobener Law Center, 415-504-2165, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party Adela Montemayor. No appearance by Defendant.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS GLORIA ARCENIO, GREGORY ARCENIO, JUDITH ARCENIO AND RUFO ARCENIOS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Causes of action for UCL violation, Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress and Fraud are sufficiently alleged and are not uncertain. Order for the same signed in open court.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Not Reported

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Atty. Jacqueline Ravenscroft of Tobener Law Center, 415-504-2165, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party Adela Montemayor. No appearance by Defendant.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS GLORIA ARCENIO, GREGORY ARCENIO, JUDITH ARCENIO AND RUFO ARCENIOS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged; UCL cause of action and remedies available under this cause of action are properly alleged. Order for the same signed in open court.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Not Reported
